chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1316 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5475/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.5476/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 ************** 1. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Accordingly, urgent application stands disposed of. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. From the perusal of record, it appears that for the same prayer clauses, the petitioner had already approached the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, wherein a favourable order was passed. Instead of availing the said remedy, he has preferred the present Constitution Petition. Once the grievance of the petitioner has been adequately addressed through a competent forum, no further indulgence of this Court is required. Accordingly, the present petition, being misconceived, stands dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
